feedback.text: I fully agree with the digital fairness act. I've witnessed both products taken away from me and others who spent money on them, and products preserved by fan communities as well as the goodwill of the few companies charitable enough to help them. FOMO as well as many other manipulative marketing tactics are used frequently on consumers, freely look up presentations such as "Let's go whaling" to see some of the ways companies are getting away with it.
